title: Personal Portfolio Website
description:
## Overview
Designed and developed a personal portfolio website using Angular standalone components and TypeScript, deployed as a static site on GitHub Pages.

## Architecture
Architected a decoupled data layer by storing all project and experience content in a dedicated GitHub repository, fetched at runtime via HTTP. This separates content from presentation — the site never needs to be rebuilt or redeployed when data changes.

## Features
- Filterable project gallery by type, tag, and status
- Filterable experience gallery by type and tag
- Expandable responsive cards with image carousels
- Markdown-rendered project and experience descriptions
- Resume download

## Workflow
Developed using a structured Git workflow with feature branches, issue tracking, and pull requests into a always-deployable `main` branch. Branch names follow a `type/issue-number-description` convention for full traceability.
